info.name: HealthSync API
info.description: Postman collection for HealthSync backend APIs. Covers success, error, and edge cases for auth, reports, AI, emergency, root, and health endpoints.

request.description: Success case for the API root endpoint.

exec: pm.test('Root payload includes version and endpoints', function () {

request.description: Health check success case.
Error case for unknown routes.
Success case for user signup. Saves token, userId, and existingEmail for later requests.

exec: pm.test('Signup returns token and user', function () {

request.description: Error case for signup with an already-registered email.
Error and edge case coverage for invalid signup payload values.
Success case for login. Refreshes token collection variable.

exec: pm.test('Login returns token and user', function () {

request.description: Error case for invalid credentials.
Validation failure when password is omitted.

exec: pm.test('Validation error payload is returned', function () {

exec: pm.test('Status is 400 after validation fix', function () {
